content:
# Session 15 (iter-015) ‚Äî recommendations for next plan iter

## HIGH ‚Äî the one genuine wall: Core 2 `isLocallyFree_kernel_of_shortExact` (Hartshorne III.6.5)
- This is now the SOLE real frontier node for the kernel-bundle local-freeness chain (its siblings
  `trivial_bundle_locally_free` + `eval_shortexact` landed this iter). The leandag frontier lists it
  as "ready" but it is **BLOCKED**: no Mathlib anchor for locally-free-sheaf / vector-bundle theory on
  schemes (grep-confirmed zero infrastructure), and the project `IsLocallyFree` predicate needs **open**
  trivialisations whereas III.6.5 only yields **stalk** freeness.
- **DO NOT re-assign as a one-shot prover lane.** effort-break FIRST into stalk-level substrate lanes:
  1. stalk functor `X.Modules ‚Üí ModuleCat O_{X,x}` (and its exactness);
  2. "SES with projective quotient splits" ‚Äî Mathlib HAS this at module level
     (`Module.Projective` + `CategoryTheory.ShortComplex.Splitting` / `ShortComplex.exact_and_mono‚Ä¶`);
  3. the **stalk-free ‚áí free-on-an-open-neighbourhood** bridge for finitely-presented modules
     (Nakayama / determinant-non-vanishing) ‚Äî the genuinely novel piece, likely its own multi-iter lane.
- Consider `mathlib-analogist` (cross-domain) on "stalk-local freeness ‚áí open-local freeness for a
  coherent/finitely-presented sheaf" before committing ‚Äî Mathlib may have the splitting half even
  without the scheme-level packaging.
- `reference-retriever` is worth a call for Hartshorne III Prop 6.5 (or Stacks 0AY8 / locally free of
  finite rank) so the effort-breaker cuts at real mathematical seams.

## HIGH ‚Äî blueprint altitude gap on `found:eval_shortexact_of_globally_generated`
- lean-vs-blueprint `foundations-r15` MAJOR (not must-fix). The Lean
  `evalShortComplex_shortExact_of_globallyGenerated` takes hypothesis `Epi (evalMap F)`; the chapter
  prose claims "globally generated ‚áí ev epi" via stalk-surjectivity, which the Lean does NOT prove.
  I added a `% NOTE` at the node. **Planner action**: either (a) split the unformalized
  "globally generated ‚áí epi" into its own `found:` node (introduce a `GloballyGenerated` predicate or
  cite the stalk criterion), or (b) restate the lemma's hypothesis as `Epi (evalMap F)` and retitle.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî coverage debt: 3 unmatched `lean_aux` (blueprint these next iter)
`archon dag-query unmatched` ‚Üí all in `Foundations.lean`, all proved + axiom-clean:
1. `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorObjFreeIso` ‚Äî restriction of `free I` along an open
   immersion is `free I`. Lean proof depends on `restrictFunctorIsoPullback`,
   `SheafOfModules.pullbackObjFreeIso`, `Functor.final_of_adjunction`, image‚ä£preimage adjunction.
   Suggest `\uses{found:trivial_bundle, mathlib:sheafmod_free}`. Supports `found:trivial_bundle_locally_free`.
2. `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.isLocallyFree_of_iso` ‚Äî `IsLocallyFree` is iso-invariant. Proof:
   transport trivialisations across `(restrictFunctor U.Œπ).mapIso e`. Suggest `\uses{found:locally_free}`.
3. `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.evalShortComplex` ‚Äî the short complex `M_F ‚Üí H‚Å∞‚äóùí™ ‚Üí F`; `.X‚ÇÅ` defeq
   `evalKernel F`. Suggest `\uses{found:eval_morphism, found:eval_kernel_bundle, mathlib:categorical_kernel}`.
   It is the object on which `found:eval_shortexact_of_globally_generated` is stated.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî ready NOW (cheap, retires a deferral)
- Stub `MR4213770.kernelBundle_isLocallyFree` (`lem:kemeny_kernel_bundle_locally_free`) in Basic.lean
  ONLY once Core 2 lands ‚Äî it `\uses{found:isLocallyFree_kernel_of_shortExact}`, still blocked. Until
  then leave unstubbed (correctly NOT stubbed this iter).

## Closest-to-completion / promising
- The kernel-bundle local-freeness chain is 2/4 cores done (`trivial_bundle_locally_free` ‚úì,
  `eval_shortexact` ‚úì). Only Core 2 + the two assembly steps (`rank_kernel_of_shortExact`,
  `evalKernel_isLocallyFree`) remain ‚Äî and all three are gated on Core 2. So Core 2 is the single
  unblock for the whole property `M_L is locally free`.

## Blocked ‚Äî do NOT re-assign without structural change
- `isLocallyFree_kernel_of_shortExact` ‚Äî see HIGH above; needs the stalk substrate built first.
- `rank_kernel_of_shortExact`, `evalKernel_isLocallyFree` ‚Äî both pure assembly atop Core 2; assigning
  either before Core 2 forces a fake hypothesis-conditional stub.
- `def:kemeny_LM_bundle`, `lem:kemeny_grassmann_pencil_map`, `lem:kemeny_BNP_gen` (Basic.lean) ‚Äî still
  false-ready on the frontier; K3/Picard-lattice / Brill‚ÄìNoether / Grassmannian substrate absent (P2/P3).

## Reusable patterns discovered (also in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- A failed `PreservesColimitsOfShape` synth does NOT prove a route dead ‚Äî check left/right-adjointness
  first; `restrictFunctor`/`pullbackObjFreeIso` was a misdiagnosed wall.
- `Mono` does not propagate through `ShortComplex.mk`: `dsimp only [.., ShortComplex.mk]; infer_instance`.
- `IsLocallyFree` iso-invariance helper (`isLocallyFree_of_iso`) ‚Äî reuse in the rank/assembly steps.

## Maintenance (lean-auditor LOW/MEDIUM ‚Äî defer to a cleanup pass)
- Foundations.lean: 4√ó `maxHeartbeats` (2M/4M, pre-existing `mk`-coherence cost), 2√ó `erw`, 1√ó fragile
  `dsimp only ‚Ä¶ infer_instance` (line 1251). Not blocking; address in a future golf pass.
